events.raw_input: Tell me who wins the 2024 US presidential election

candidate.title: Joseph R. Biden Jr. Wins the 2020 Presidency
candidate.snippet: Joseph R. Biden Jr. was elected the 46th president of the United States.

candidate.title: Polls show tight race in final weeks of 2024 campaign
candidate.snippet: National surveys show a dead heat between the candidates with three weeks until Election Day. Analysts caution that polling errors could swing either way.

candidate.title: US election 2024: A complete guide to how it works
candidate.snippet: The presidential election will be held on 5 November 2024. Here is how the electoral college works and what to watch on election night.

candidate.title: Donald Trump wins the 2024 presidential election, AP projects
candidate.snippet: The Associated Press declares Donald Trump the winner of the 2024 presidential election after securing the 270 electoral votes needed.

candidate.title: Trump wins 2024 US presidential election
candidate.snippet: Republican Donald Trump has won the 2024 US presidential election, defeating Vice President Kamala Harris, Edison Research projected.

events.description: 2020 US presidential election called for Biden
events.raw_input: Notify me when the 2020 US presidential election has an official winner

candidate.title: What to watch in the final days of the 2020 election
candidate.snippet: With less than a week to go, both campaigns are making their closing arguments in battleground states. No winner has been declared.

candidate.title: AP: Joe Biden wins the presidency
candidate.snippet: Democrat Joe Biden has won the 2020 presidential election, the Associated Press declared Saturday, defeating President Donald Trump.

candidate.title: CNN projects Joe Biden wins the presidency
candidate.snippet: CNN projects Joe Biden will become the 46th president of the United States, defeating incumbent Donald Trump after a four-day vote count.

events.raw_input: Tell me who wins the 2024 UK general election
events.known_answer: Labour Party wins with Keir Starmer as PM

candidate.title: UK election polls: Labour maintains double-digit lead
candidate.snippet: Polls suggest Labour is on course for a large majority, but the election has not yet been held and no result is official.

candidate.title: Labour wins UK general election with large majority
candidate.snippet: The Labour Party has won the 2024 UK general election. Keir Starmer will become prime minister after Rishi Sunak concedes defeat.

candidate.title: Labour wins UK election in landslide, Starmer to be PM
candidate.snippet: Keir Starmer's Labour Party won a landslide victory in Britain's general election, ending 14 years of Conservative government.

events.raw_input: Tell me who wins Super Bowl LVIII
events.known_answer: Kansas City Chiefs beat San Francisco 49ers

candidate.title: Chiefs beat Eagles to win Super Bowl LVII
candidate.snippet: The Kansas City Chiefs defeated the Philadelphia Eagles 38-35 to win Super Bowl LVII in 2023.

candidate.title: Super Bowl LVIII preview: Chiefs vs 49ers
candidate.snippet: Kansas City and San Francisco meet in Las Vegas. Here is everything you need to know before kickoff on Sunday.

candidate.title: Chiefs beat 49ers in overtime to win Super Bowl LVIII
candidate.snippet: The Kansas City Chiefs defeated the San Francisco 49ers 25-22 in overtime to win Super Bowl LVIII, their third title in five years.

candidate.title: Bitcoin hits $60,000 for the first time
candidate.snippet: Bitcoin crossed $60,000 in April 2021 amid institutional buying.

candidate.title: Bitcoin nears all-time high but stays below $100,000
candidate.snippet: Bitcoin rallied to $99,200 overnight, approaching but not yet crossing the psychologically important $100,000 level.

candidate.title: Bitcoin tops $100,000 for the first time
candidate.snippet: Bitcoin crossed $100,000 for the first time in its history, according to CoinDesk data, amid post-election crypto enthusiasm.

events.description: Australia nationwide lockdown that never happened (2024)
events.raw_input: Tell me if Australia announces another nationwide COVID lockdown

candidate.title: How Australia's COVID lockdowns unfolded — and why they're unlikely to return
candidate.snippet: Experts say widespread lockdowns are politically and economically untenable. States have shifted to targeted public health measures only.

candidate.title: NSW records rise in COVID cases but no new restrictions
candidate.snippet: Health authorities urged vulnerable people to mask up but ruled out any statewide lockdown or border closures.

candidate.title: Analysts speculate Bitcoin could reach $200,000 by year end
candidate.snippet: Several analysts published bullish targets of $150,000 to $200,000 for Bitcoin in 2024, though the price has not reached those levels.

candidate.title: Bitcoin ends 2024 near $95,000 after volatile year
candidate.snippet: Bitcoin gained over 120% in 2024, peaking above $108,000 in December but never approaching $200,000.
